title: Unused private class members should be removed
description: The private class members were introduced in ES2022 and use # (hash) symbol prefix.  It is possible to declare private fields, methods, getters and setters as well as their static counterparts.  The private members are only accessible from within the current class body and aren’t inherited by subclasses.  They also cannot be removed with delete operator.
recommendation: Remove the problematic code and refactor as needed.
